node.title: Uber| Phone | Distinct Even Pair Sum

topic.title: Uber| Phone | Distinct Even Pair Sum

post.content:
This is easiest to see with 2 for loops first.
1st loop without considering 0,N-1 pair:
At index i, let dp1 be the number of max even pairs at i-1.  Here, nums[i] is not used to form a pair with nums[i-1].
Then, dp2 is max of even pairs at i-2.  Here, we can form another pair nums[i],nums[i-1] if its sum is even; otherwise, dp2 is just the same as dp1.
2nd loop consider 0,N-1 and set initial dp1=1 if 0,N-1 pair's sum is even.
```
def max_distinct_even_pairs(nums):
    dp1 = dp2 = 0
    ln = len(nums)
    for i in range(1,ln):
        tmp2 = dp1
        tmp1 = 1+dp2 if (nums[i]+nums[i-1])%2 == 0 else dp1
        dp1,dp2 = tmp1,tmp2
    mx = max(dp1,dp2)

    if (nums[0] + nums[ln-1])%2 == 0:
        dp1 = 1
        dp2 = 0
        for i in range(1,ln-1):
            tmp2 = dp1
            tmp1 = 1 + dp2 if (nums[i] + nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0 else dp1
            dp1, dp2 = tmp1, tmp2
        mx = max(mx, dp1, dp2)
    return mx

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([1,2,4,1,9]))  # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([1,2,4,6,8,9])) # 3
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([0,2,4,6,8,9]))  # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([4,2,5,8,7,3,7])) # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs([2,1,4,6,8,9]))  # 1
```

Now, one loop solution. The only way a pair 0,N-1 (that forms an even sum) can improve the max answer is if both i=0 and i=N-1 are not included in the max result: 0,1 AND N-2,N-1 do not form even sums.  So, we do the 1st loop from above noticing if both 0 and N-1 are not included...
```
def max_distinct_even_pairs2(nums):
    dp1 = dp2 = 0
    ln = len(nums)
    frstIncl = lastIncl = True
    for i in range(1,ln):
        tmp2 = dp1
        tmp1 = 1+dp2 if (nums[i]+nums[i-1])%2 == 0 else dp1
        if i==1 and tmp1==dp1:
            frstIncl = False
        if i==ln-1 and tmp1==dp1:
            lastIncl = False

        dp1,dp2 = tmp1,tmp2
    return max(dp1,dp2) + (1 if not frstIncl and not lastIncl and (nums[0]+nums[ln-1])%2==0 else 0)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([1,2,4,1,9]))  # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([1,2,4,6,8,9])) # 3
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([0,2,4,6,8,9]))  # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([4,2,5,8,7,3,7])) # 2
    print(max_distinct_even_pairs2([2,1,4,6,8,9]))  # 1
```
Sort of like House Robber. Take two variables: maxusinglastincluded, lastnotincluded and update accordingly for A[1:n] and A[0:n-1]
